extraction.one_line_summary: BERNAL Egan attacked inside 3km on Gurnigel climb, distanced DENNIS by 23 seconds to extend GC lead before crucial TT.
tactical_patterns: BERNAL Egan pre-empted time trial specialists by attacking decisive summit finish, banking time before TT weakness exposed.
Team INEOS elevated tempo before final 3km, creating launch platform rather than defending conservatively with yellow jersey.
POZZOVIVO Domenico initially followed BERNAL Egan but paced back to support teammate DENNIS rather than pursuing own result.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: attacked inside 3km with enough margin to gain 23s on TT specialist, showing confidence to race offensively from yellow
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: neutral: marked by teammate POZZOVIVO but unable to follow BERNAL's acceleration, acknowledging impending TT advantage
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: neutral: sacrificed breakaway bridging attempt to pace DENNIS in chase, demonstrating team tactical discipline over personal ambition
rider_signals.HIRT Jan: positive: finished fifth on decisive summit, showing GC climbing form without needing team support
